TTFB: 303.02ms
[[ATTACHMENT|test-results\monitoring-monitoring-M-1--dbae8-nce-Insight-with-Throttling-monitoring\video.webm]]

testcase.name: E2E-1: Register User @critical @stable

property.name: Test Data
property.value: Name: user6113 | Email: qa_20260318T171656151Z_149@example.com | Password: Test1234

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › e2e\Account_create.spec.ts:7:5 › E2E-1: Register User @critical @stable › Sign up new user
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed
Expected pattern: /.*account_created/ Received string: "https://automationexercise.com/signup" Timeout: 10000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 10000ms 13 × unexpected value "https://automationexercise.com/signup"
at ..\pages\signupPage.ts:112
110 | 111 | async verifyAccountCreation() { > 112 | await expect(this.page).toHaveURL(/.*account_created/, { timeout: 10000 }); | ^ 113 | const successMessage = this.page.locator('h2:has-text("Account Created!")'); 114 | await expect(successMessage).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10000 }); 115 | await this.page.locator('a[data-qa="continue-button"]').click(); at SignupPage.verifyAccountCreation (C:\study\pw-e2e-automationexercise\pages\signupPage.ts:112:29) at C:\study\pw-e2e-automationexercise\tests\e2e\Account_create.spec.ts:20:22 at C:\study\pw-e2e-automationexercise\tests\e2e\Account_create.spec.ts:17:3

…
intercepts pointer events - retrying click action - waiting 500ms at ..\pages\checkoutPage.ts:66 64 | 65 | async placeOrder() { > 66 | await this.placeOrderButton.click(); | ^ 67 | await expect(this.placeOrderButton).toBeHidden(); 68 | 69 | } at CheckoutPage.placeOrder (C:\study\pw-e2e-automationexercise\pages\checkoutPage.ts:66:33) at C:\study\pw-e2e-automationexercise\tests\e2e\Checkout.spec.ts:106:28 at C:\study\pw-e2e-automationexercise\tests\e2e\Checkout.spec.ts:105:16 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\e2e-Checkout-Place-Order-t-8c86e--Login-and-Payment-critical-chromium\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\e2e-Checkout-Place-Order-t-8c86e--Login-and-Payment-critical-chromium\video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\test-results\e2e-Checkout-Place-Order-t-8c86e--Login-and-Payment-critical-chromium\error-context.md attachment #4: trace (application/zip) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\e2e-Checkout-Place-Order-t-8c86e--Login-and-Payment-critical-chromium\trace.zip Usage: npx playwright show-trace ..\test-results\e2e-Checkout-Place-Order-t-8c86e--Login-and-Payment-critical-chromium\trace.zip ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: BUG-4: Payment field is blocked by overlay on large screens
C-1 Concurrency Trap: Catching the 200 OK bug

property.name: fail
property.value: BUG-###: Race condition returns 200 OK

failure.message: Account_create_concurrency.spec.ts:7:5 C-1 Concurrency Trap: Catching the 200 OK bug

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › monitoring\Account_create_concurrency.spec.ts:7:5 › C-1 Concurrency Trap: Catching the 200 OK bug
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: 4 users failed to register due to race condition.
36 | const failed = results.filter(r => r.status === 'rejected'); 37 | if (failed.length > 0) { > 38 | throw new Error(`${failed.length} users failed to register due to race condition.`); | ^ 39 | } 40 | }); 41 | at C:\study\pw-e2e-automationexercise\tests\monitoring\Account_create_concurrency.spec.ts:38:15
